channel.title: S3 Policy :: Tuan Dat | Cloud & Backend Developer
channel.description: STAGE 4: S3 PERMITS (POLICY) CloudFront needs a “permission” to pull files from your 2 closed buckets. In CloudFront > Origins tab. Select Origin Singapore > Edit > Copy policy. Open a new tab > S3 Console > Bucket sgutodolist-frontend-sg. Permissions tab > Bucket Policy > Edit > Paste > Save. Repeat with Bucket Virginia:

item.title: S3 Policy
item.description: GIAI ĐOẠN 4: CẤP QUYỀN S3 (POLICY) CloudFront cần “giấy phép” để lấy file từ 2 bucket kín của bạn. Trong CloudFront > Tab Origins. Chọn Origin Singapore > Edit > Copy policy. Mở tab mới > S3 Console > Bucket sgutodolist-frontend-sg. Tab Permissions > Bucket Policy > Edit > Paste > Save. Lặp lại với Bucket Virginia:
